identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.
anti_patterns: Boring 'Left Sidebar, Right Content' without visual tension

headings.usage: Use font-light for large display text to create elegance. Use font-bold only for emphasis.

body.usage: High legibility for form fields. Use 400 for inputs, 500 for labels.

usage_rules.backgrounds: Do NOT use pure black. Use the 'surface' color for cards to create depth.
usage_rules.gradients: Use subtle radial gradients (top-right) to simulate lighting. Avoid linear gradients for backgrounds.
usage_rules.borders: Use 1px borders with 10% opacity for structure. Active inputs get 'accent_neon' glow.
usage_rules.text: Never use pure white (#FFFFFF) for body text. Use #F5F7F9 to reduce eye strain.

desktop.description: A central floating glass card containing the form, suspended over a blurred, darkened campus background. Navigation is a detached 'Mission Control' rail on the left.
desktop.grid: grid grid-cols-12 gap-8 h-screen overflow-hidden p-8
structure: Nav Rail: col-span-3 h-full flex flex-col justify-center
Main Stage: col-span-9 h-full relative glass-card rounded-3xl overflow-y-auto

mobile.description: Navigation collapses into a top progress bar. Sections are treated as 'cards' that slide in from the right.

inputs.classes: h-12 rounded-full bg-background/50 border-border/50 focus:border-accent-neon focus:ring-accent-neon/20 transition-all duration-300
inputs.label_behavior: Floating label or distinct uppercase label above input

buttons.primary: bg-primary hover:bg-primary-hover text-white rounded-full px-8 py-6 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,180,216,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,180,216,0.5)] transition-all hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-primary/30 text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 rounded-full px-8 py-6

navigation.step_indicator: Vertical timeline with glowing nodes. Active step has a 'pulse-glow' effect. Completed steps turn green (#28A745).

visual_enhancers.noise: Add a subtle noise texture overlay (opacity 0.03) to the entire app to kill digital flatness.

animations.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.4 }}

background.treatment: Darken by 70% and blur (8px) to use as background wallpaper.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text is at least WCAG AA compliant. Use #94A3B8 for secondary text, not darker.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings are MANDATORY. Use the 'accent_neon' color for focus rings.
accessibility.screen_readers: All inputs must have associated labels. Use aria-live for form errors.

implementation_steps.name: App Shell & Layout
implementation_steps.instruction: Create the 'Glass Monolith' layout. Set up the background image with overlay. Build the Sidebar navigation component.

implementation_steps.name: Form Components
implementation_steps.instruction: Customize Shadcn Input, Select, and Checkbox to match the 'pill-shaped' and 'glass' aesthetic. Implement the 'Floating Label' pattern if possible.

implementation_steps.name: Section Implementation
implementation_steps.instruction: Build the 7 form sections. Use 'Progressive Disclosure' - only show relevant fields. Example: 'Military' details only appear if 'Veteran' is selected.

implementation_steps.name: Review & Polish
implementation_steps.instruction: Add entrance animations (framer-motion). Verify tab order and contrast. Add the 'Confetti' effect on final submission.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for text.
Do NOT use default browser scrollbars. Use the custom thin scrollbar defined in index.css.
Mobile First: Ensure the 'Glass Monolith' collapses gracefully into a vertical stack on mobile.
